name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Hialeah, FL pawn shop Value Pawn & Jewelry at 457 E 49th St offers quick loans on jewelry, electronics, and more with flexible terms and same-day approvals.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates as a standalone pawn shop at 457 E 49th St in Hialeah, FL. This Hialeah location is convenient for residents and visitors seeking quick cash loans or looking to purchase secondhand jewelry, electronics, and collectibles. The shop is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, Saturday 9AM to 5PM, and closed on Sundays.

At this Hialeah, FL location, customers can pawn jewelry, watches, electronics, musical instruments, and other valuable items, or browse the inventory of previously pawned merchandise. Whether you need a short-term loan or want to sell items outright, the team at 457 E 49th St can help. Call +1 305-687-1713 to ask about current inventory, get a quote on your items, or inquire about loan terms and rates specific to this Hialeah shop.

If you're in Hialeah and need fast cash, bring a valid ID and the item(s) you wish to pawn—the approval process is straightforward and loans can close the same day. The 457 E 49th St location is known for fair pricing and quick service to Hialeah residents.
pros: Fast cash loans with no credit check required—bring collateral and get instant valuation
Expert gold and diamond buyers who test precious metals to ensure fair pricing
Massive inventory discounts (25-70% off retail) on brand-name pre-owned electronics, jewelry, tools, and accessories
Flexible payment options including layaway with only 10% down and third-party financing up to 12 months
EZ+ Rewards Program allows online pawn management, remote payments, and point accumulation on eligible transactions
Instant Quote tool provides real-time electronics valuations online before visiting the store
Extended store hours (9am-7pm weekdays) and specialized services including firearms sales and auto loans
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering physical collateral—items are forfeited if loan is not repaid by maturity date
Loans subject to fees and interest charges that are not transparently disclosed on the website; customers must visit in-person for terms
All merchandise is pre-owned with no warranty implied by brand owners; disclaimer states trademarks owned by others are not affiliated
Online payment options specifically excluded in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania, limiting accessibility in those states
Pawn loans do not build credit history—transactions are not reported to credit bureaus, offering no credit-building benefit
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000+) who own valuable items and want to avoid credit checks or loan applications
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking deeply discounted (25-70% off) brand-name electronics, jewelry, and merchandise
People seeking short-term liquidity solutions without long-term debt obligations or credit implications
Gold and jewelry sellers wanting expert evaluation and competitive pricing from tested precious metals buyers
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for consumers with valuable collateral who need immediate cash without credit checks or lengthy loan applications. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical items as security and do not build credit—this is a short-term liquidity solution, not a credit-building or long-term financing tool, and loan terms including fees must be verified in-person.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based short-term loans with fees)
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with metal testing and expert valuation
Retail merchandise sales (pre-owned brand-name items at 25-70% discount)
Layaway purchases with 10% down and monthly payments
Third-party financing and 'Take Today' payment plans (up to 12 months)
Instant Quote online tool for electronics valuations
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up guarantees
EZ+ Rewards Program with online account management and point accumulation
Gold buying and jewelry selling services
meta_description: Hialeah, FL pawn shop Value Pawn & Jewelry at 457 E 49th St. Quick loans and sales on jewelry, electronics, and valuables—same-day approvals.
